# DMARC Management

Protect your email domain and stop brand impersonation

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/dmarc-management/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare DMARC Management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dmarc-management/index.md): Stop brand impersonation.

## Enable DMARC Management

- [Enable DMARC Management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dmarc-management/enable/index.md): Allow Cloudflare to process DMARC reports for your apex domain.

## Security records

- [Security records](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dmarc-management/security-records/index.md): Learn how to configure SPF records, DKIM records, and DMARC records in your Cloudflare account to help improve email security.

## DNS lookup limit

- [DNS lookup limit](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dmarc-management/dns-lookup-limits/index.md): Review number of DNS lookups on your SPF records

## Statistics and details

- [Statistics and details](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dmarc-management/statistics/index.md): Review whether emails sent on your behalf passed DMARC, SPF, and DKIM checks.
